subcodes.first_line: Equal to all previous Books, nay surpassing them, verses have descended from the heaven of divine knowledge, and the horizon of the world hath been illumined by the radiance of its lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: معادل کتب قبل بل ازید از سماء علم الهی آیات نازل و افق عالم از تجلیات انوار
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
